name: Freecell Solitaire
author: Poki
description: Freecell Solitaire takes the classic card game to new heights with varying difficulties and exciting power-ups! You need to arrange all the face-up cards onto the foundation, sequencing them from Ace to King by suit. To aid in your strategy, there are four open cells in the top left corner where you can temporarily place cards. Don't worry if you get stuck, just give the light bulb button a click for some helpful hints. For those trickier moments, the shuffle button can mix a stack up for you! Need to backtrack? No problem – use the undo function to reverse your last move. Plus, you can supercharge your game with a power-up to shift any card to the front of the stack. Enjoy the challenge! How to play Freecell Solitaire ? Use your finger or left mouse button to select and move cards! Who created Freecell Solitaire? Freecell Solitaire is created by Adgard. Play their other skill and arcade games on Poki: Pop It vs Spinner , Find The Candy , MadZOOng , Merge to Million , Mahjoctopus , and One Hundred Castles Solitaire ! How can I play Freecell Solitaire for free? You can play Freecell Solitaire for free on Poki. Can I play Freecell Solitaire on mobile devices and desktop? Freecell Solitaire can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
